tasks.label: 🚀 Start All (Docker)
tasks.detail: Inicia o banco de dados PostgreSQL e o backend Django via Docker Compose

tasks.label: 🚀 Start All Detached (Docker)
tasks.detail: Inicia todos os serviços em background (detached)

tasks.label: 🛑 Stop All (Docker)
tasks.detail: Para e remove todos os containers Docker

tasks.label: 🗑️ Stop All + Remove Volumes (Docker)
tasks.detail: ⚠️ Para os containers e apaga os volumes (dados do banco)

tasks.label: 🐘 Start DB Only
tasks.detail: Inicia apenas o container do PostgreSQL

tasks.label: 🔧 Start Backend Only
tasks.detail: Inicia apenas o container do backend Django (requer DB rodando)

tasks.label: ⚡ Start Frontend (Next.js)
tasks.detail: Inicia o servidor de desenvolvimento Next.js em localhost:3000

tasks.label: 🧪 Run Tests (pytest)
tasks.detail: Executa os testes do backend com pytest dentro do container

tasks.label: 🧪 Run Tests with Coverage
tasks.detail: Executa os testes com relatório de cobertura de código

tasks.label: 🔍 Ruff Lint
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend ruff check .
tasks.detail: Executa o linter Ruff no código backend

tasks.label: 🔍 Ruff Format Check
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend ruff format --check .
tasks.detail: Verifica a formatação do código sem modificá-lo

tasks.label: ✨ Ruff Format (Fix)
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend ruff format .
tasks.detail: Formata automaticamente o código backend com Ruff

tasks.label: 📦 Django Migrate
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend python manage.py migrate
tasks.detail: Executa as migrações pendentes do Django

tasks.label: 📦 Django Make Migrations
tasks.command: docker compose exec backend python manage.py makemigrations
tasks.detail: Cria novas migrações com base nas alterações dos models

tasks.label: 👤 Django Create Superuser
tasks.command: docker compose exec -it backend python manage.py createsuperuser
tasks.detail: Cria um superusuário para o painel admin do Django

tasks.label: 📋 Docker Logs (Backend)
tasks.detail: Exibe os logs em tempo real do container backend
